serviceFeedback.text: Repair was completed within the SLA deadline. Technician was professional and communicative throughout the process. Minor delay in parts procurement but overall great experience.

negativeFeedback.text: Repair took much longer than promised. Had to follow up multiple times.

npsPromoter.comment: Excellent warranty service. Would definitely recommend WaaZ to friends and family.

npsPassive.comment: Good service but the claim process could be faster.

npsDetractor.comment: Claim was rejected without clear explanation. Not satisfied.
